'use strict'; var test = require('tape'); var stringify = require('../'); test('custom comparison function', function (t) { t.plan(1); var obj = { c: 8, b: [{z:6,y:5,x:4},7], a: 3 }; var s = stringify(obj, function (a, b) { return a.key < b.key ? 1 : -1; }); t.equal(s, '{"c":8,"b":[{"z":6,"y":5,"x":4},7],"a":3}'); });
